parameters.query:
SELECT
  ee."workflowId",
  we.name AS workflow_name,
  COUNT(*)::int AS total_execucoes_travadas,
  MIN(ee."startedAt") AS execucao_mais_antiga,
  MAX(ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - ee."startedAt")) / 60)) AS maior_tempo_min
FROM execution_entity ee
LEFT JOIN workflow_entity we
  ON we.id = ee."workflowId"
WHERE ee.finished = false
  AND ee."startedAt" IS NOT NULL
  AND ee."deletedAt" IS NULL
  AND NOW() - ee."startedAt" > interval '30 minutes'
GROUP BY ee."workflowId", we.name
ORDER BY total_execucoes_travadas DESC, maior_tempo_min DESC;

SELECT
  ee."workflowId",
  we.name AS workflow_name,
  COUNT(*)::int AS total_execucoes_travadas,
  MIN(ee."startedAt") AS execucao_mais_antiga,
  MAX(ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - ee."startedAt")) / 60)) AS maior_tempo_min
FROM execution_entity ee
LEFT JOIN workflow_entity we
  ON we.id = ee."workflowId"
WHERE ee.finished = false
  AND ee."startedAt" IS NOT NULL
  AND ee."deletedAt" IS NULL
  AND NOW() - ee."startedAt" > interval '30 minutes'
GROUP BY ee."workflowId", we.name
ORDER BY total_execucoes_travadas DESC, maior_tempo_min DESC;
